name: Advance America
description_short: Grand Prairie, TX residents can visit Advance America at 675 W Pioneer Pkwy Ste 114 for payday and title loans.
description_long:
Advance America in Grand Prairie, TX is located at 675 W Pioneer Pkwy Ste 114, a convenient standalone storefront in the Pioneer Parkway area. The location is open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, with limited Saturday hours from 10 AM to 3 PM. The branch is closed on Sundays.

At this Grand Prairie location, you can access fast payday loans and title loans to cover immediate cash needs. Call 972-262-3444 to speak with a loan officer about your options, eligibility, and the application process. Same-day funding is available for qualified applicants.

For Grand Prairie residents facing unexpected expenses, this Advance America branch at 675 W Pioneer Pkwy offers a quick alternative to traditional bank loans. Bring a valid government ID, proof of income, and an active bank account to speed up your application. Walk-ins are welcome during business hours, so stop by when you're ready to apply.
address: 675 W Pioneer Pkwy Ste 114, Grand Prairie, TX 75051

company_info.headquarters: 675 W Pioneer Pkwy Ste 114, Grand Prairie, TX 75051

pros: Same-day loan funding available for payday and installment loans
High customer satisfaction rating of 4.9/5 stars from 125,588+ reviews
Three distinct loan products to match different financial needs and loan amounts
Flexible application: online, in-store, or by phone pre-qualification
Spanish-language support available at physical locations
Installment loans offer longer repayment terms than typical payday loans
Extended operating hours (9am-6pm most days) for working customers
cons: Specific APR rates and total cost of borrowing not disclosed on website
Payday loans are short-term (2-4 weeks) requiring rapid repayment
Title loans require vehicle ownership and carry repossession risk as collateral-based products
Loan amounts ($100-$1,000 for unsecured products) insufficient for larger financial emergencies
As a subprime lender, serves primarily consumers unable to access traditional bank financing
best_for: Salaried workers needing bridge financing between paychecks
Consumers with fair/poor credit unable to qualify for bank loans
Vehicle owners seeking collateral-based loans up to $25,000
Borrowers preferring in-person service and immediate cash access
diagnosis: Advance America is best suited for employed individuals facing short-term cash gaps or unexpected expenses who have reliable income and either lack credit access or need same-day funding. The primary caveat is that these products carry significantly higher costs than traditional loans and should be viewed as emergency-only solutions; the 2-4 week payday loan terms in particular can create debt cycles if borrowers cannot repay when due.
services: Installment loans online or in-store (up to $1,000)
Same-day funding for payday and installment loans
In-store loan consultations with trained staff
Online loan applications and account management
Loan application support (ID, income verification, bank account requirements)

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Advance America at 675 W Pioneer Pkwy, Grand Prairie, TX. Same-day payday and title loans available.
